Section one opens the investigation with enough prose, commas, and details to score like a full content block, while still sitting beside the later sections in the same parent container.

Section two follows the same investigation with enough prose, commas, and details to score like a full content block, which should push extraction toward the shared ancestor instead of a single winner.

Section three closes the investigation with enough prose, commas, and details to score like a full content block, so aggregation needs to preserve the whole longform piece.
